falsifiers.title: Cross-substrate OR signature consistency (trapped-ion vs superconducting)
falsifiers.claim_under_test: 4-qubit GHZ dephasing tau_2 on IonQ Forte 1 trapped-ion is consistent (within 1.5x) with superconducting-QC OR signature reported by PRNewswire 2025-03
falsifiers.fail_criterion: ratio outside [0.67, 1.5] -> OR signature substrate-specific -> Orch-OR weakened
falsifiers.interpretation_fail: PRNewswire SC observation may be SC-quasiparticle artifact, not generic OR
falsifiers.external_dependency: PRNewswire-cited SC paper tau_2 numerical values

falsifiers.title: Decoherence-only null model
falsifiers.claim_under_test: C1 GHZ tau_2 falls within 20% of C2 1-qubit baseline tau_2 / 4 (standard N-qubit GHZ depolarizing scaling) — no anomaly
falsifiers.fail_criterion: tau_2_C1 << tau_2_C2/4 -> extra dephasing (Orch-OR plausible OR correlated noise)
falsifiers.interpretation_pass: Standard decoherence sufficient -> no OR contribution detectable at this scale
falsifiers.interpretation_fail: Anomaly detected -> need F-N12-4 to discriminate OR vs correlated-noise

falsifiers.title: Mass-scale Diosi-Penrose escape window
falsifiers.claim_under_test: tau_2 ratio (ion vs SC) consistent with simplified DP scaling tau_DP ~ 1/m (m_sc ~ 1e9 amu effective Cooper-pair vs m_ion = 171 amu * 4 = 684 amu)
falsifiers.pass_criterion: measured ratio within (0.1x, 10x) of theoretical ratio
falsifiers.honest_c3_caveat: SC 'effective mass' definition ambiguous (Cooper pair count, junction capacitance scaling) — range used not point value

falsifiers.title: Measurement-induced collapse rate (thermal vs OR-augmented model)
falsifiers.claim_under_test: C1 parity histogram fitted by Markovian Lindblad thermal model vs OR-augmented model; AIC/BIC favors thermal-only
falsifiers.pass_criterion: delta_AIC (thermal vs OR-augmented) >= 6 favoring thermal -> Orch-OR weakened

falsifiers.title: Replicability and null robustness
falsifiers.claim_under_test: MVP rerun at D+7 yields same F-N12-1 verdict (PASS or FAIL stable across 1-week interval)
falsifiers.fail_criterion: verdict differs -> single-run trust insufficient -> MVP scale-up required (>$50 cap)

top_1_falsifier_summary.one_liner: Does the OR signature (dephasing rate consistent with Diosi-Penrose) appear on trapped-ion just as PRNewswire 2025-03 reported on superconducting? Pass if tau_2 ratio in [0.67, 1.5]; fail if outside.

honest_c3_note: All 5 falsifiers preregistered before any AWS account onboarding or QPU task submission. Live measurement count = 0. F-N12-1 is the cross-substrate OR test; the other 4 reuse MVP data (F-N12-5 needs separate $20.90 authorization).
